rows.label: qev055802_MSG0001
rows.name:
Phew... Another moment and I
would have been dissolved in
its rising gastric acid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0002
rows.name: This means... it was a failure, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmm... I conducted a rigorous
investigation... Could there be some
discrepancy from the actual Bias incense?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_JNK0010
rows.name: Point Out[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_SEL0011
rows.name:
Point out Min'boiton's
insensitivity for not panicking
at all in the face of danger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_JNK0020
rows.name: Suggest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_SEL0021
rows.name: Say he should ask the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0004
rows.name:
Panicking does not increase
one's probability of survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0005
rows.name:
We Orphe do not engage in such
wasteful emotional expression.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0006
rows.name:
...More importantly, the problem
is that the incense didn't work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0007
rows.name:
I gathered all the data I could...
I suppose I have no choice but
to ask the Bias directly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0008
rows.name:
As I thought... No matter how much
data you gather, nothing is more
certain than asking directly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0009
rows.name:
However, they are a species of such
massive proportions... Didn't they
rampage as the vanguard of Growth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0010
rows.name:
Thinking of my own frail body,
I find them even more terrifying
than the beast from earlier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_JNK0030
rows.name: Reassure[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_SEL0031
rows.name:
Tell him that many of the
Bias in NLA are friendly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_JNK0040
rows.name: Scare[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_SEL0041
rows.name:
Threaten him by saying he
might be beaten to a pulp.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0011
rows.name:
Indeed, if that weren't the
case, they wouldn't be able
to live alongside Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0012
rows.name:
Terrifying... Have you ever
been harmed by them too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0013
rows.name:
...But I must master their
secret arts no matter what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0014
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—I've decided. I will return to the Ma-non
ship for now and try asking the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0015
rows.name:
Until now, I feared encountering
enemies who do not possess an
Ovah, so I stayed away, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0016
rows.name:
I can't afford to say such things
anymore. I will absolutely make that
beast from earlier my servant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0017
rows.name: Ugh... ugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0018
rows.name:
This is...! What happened
to Min'boiton!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Tch! Don't tell me he got eaten
again!? Damn it, I got worried and came
to check... My bad feeling was right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Hey, hey! Min'boiton! Wake up! You
can't... die in a place like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0021
rows.name:
You don't need to panic, do you?
From what I can see, I think he
just fainted from shock![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0022
rows.name:
You always just say whatever comes to
mind... Nothing you say is reliable-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0023
rows.name:
Ah... But he's regaining
consciousness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0024
rows.name: ...Everyone, I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0025
rows.name:
Min'boiton, you got eaten
again-mo! You need to stop
doing such dangerous things-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0026
rows.name:
But... in order to survive on
this planet, I need strength...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0027
rows.name:
If you have trouble, just rely on your friends.
If there's a dangerous enemy, I'll beat them.
If you want wisdom, Noborata will provide it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0028
rows.name:
And... if you have no money,
Chikochiko will figure something out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0029
rows.name:
Chikochiko is the only one who
sounds lame-mo! But I can lend
you a little bit of money-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0030
rows.name: ...Everyone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0031
rows.name:
Thank you very much... To be so kind
to me, when we've only just met...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0032
rows.name:
We haven't done anything yet. The
one you should be thanking first is
that Earthling over there, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0033
rows.name: ...[ST:playername ], you saved me, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0034
rows.name:
Thanks to you, I was able to reunite with
these wonderful friends. This is a token
of my gratitude. Please accept it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0035
rows.name:
...It is a mysterious thing. Even
though they do not possess an Ovah,
I feel a warmth similar to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0036
rows.name:
This feeling... what word
should I use to define it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_JNK0050
rows.name: Earnest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_SEL0051
rows.name:
Convey straightforwardly
that it is a bond.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_JNK0060
rows.name: Cynical[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_SEL0061
rows.name:
Smugly state that he shouldn't
treat a temporary emotional
high as something special.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0037
rows.name:
A bond... is it? That word
feels perfectly fitting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0038
rows.name:
I feel a very strong
bond with you as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0039
rows.name:
You sound somewhat like a hollow
Orphean who has lost their Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0040
rows.name:
That is not the case. The emotions
I feel towards everyone and you
are by no means temporary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0041
rows.name:
...Alright! Since we've gained a new
comrade, let's make the most of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0042
rows.name:
Why don't we all figure out our next steps together?
We're going to be living in NLA for the time being.
We've got to find something we can do there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0043
rows.name:
...Yes! I am starting to feel that if
I am with you all, even someone as
powerless as me can be of some use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055802_MSG0044
rows.name:
Haha! Then let's head back to NLA for a
strategy meeting! We're going home,
everyone! Come on... you too, Min'boiton![ST:wait ]
